     the Fermi energy is    -0.4726 ev

!    total energy              =  -11771.86195087 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.3E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.08769718 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -11771.77425369 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -238780.15623756 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  120491.24338262 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4211.05849406 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  110731.21179417 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -3.01469885 Ry

     total magnetization       =    43.00 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    53.65 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  43 iterations
